info.DAturUpanandinIwippaRI: GawAdikAryArTam ayaM pUrvam (817) ityatra anUditaH asti

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'veSca svano Bojane' (8369) ityatra vizvaRatItyudAhftaM vfttO tasya saSabdaM BuNkta ityarTaH aByavahArakriyAviSezo'BiDIyate yatra svananamastIti vfttiH
'sa SabdaH… pratisasvAna tatrEva kurupARqavayorbale' (BA0 droRa0 10347) pratisasvAna pratyaSrUyata pratiSrudrUpeRA'SrUyata
